finance.summary: US banking regulators propose Basel reforms, reducing capital burden; global markets react to potential Iran-US de-escalation; oil prices fall >5%.
highlights: Basel reforms for trade finance proposed
Oil prices drop >5% amid Iran-US negotiation hopes
Northwestern Mutual recognized as top independent broker-dealer

art.summary: New murals in Dallas Design District; Heinz Mack's 95th birthday exhibition in Düsseldorf; ceramics exhibition in Toledo; retrospective of Clayton Pond at UB Art Galleries.
highlights: Heinz Mack exhibition celebrates his 95th birthday
Clayton Pond retrospective upcoming at UB Anderson Gallery
